name: codex-usage-meter
description: Refresh Codex CLI usage limits and expose the latest rate-limit snapshot as JSON, Markdown, and an MCP tool.

interface.shortDescription: Refresh and read Codex usage-limit snapshots
interface.longDescription: Codex Usage Meter runs a minimal read-only Codex CLI request on demand, then parses Codex rate-limit events from the local Codex log database and exposes the latest 5-hour and weekly usage windows to Hermes or other MCP clients. It does not read or print Codex auth tokens.
defaultPrompt: Refresh and show my latest local Codex usage-limit snapshot
